metadata.description: Self-hosted marketplace shipping the harness plugin: a Clarify -> Context -> Plan -> Generate -> Evaluate pipeline for Claude Code with deterministic state and crash-safe resume.

plugins.name: harness
plugins.description: Adaptive 5-phase feature-implementation pipeline. SKILL.md drives creative phases via Agent calls; scripts/harness.py holds deterministic state (resume, verify, conflicts, classify-failure). stdlib Python + PyYAML only.
